CustomField.description: Semicolon-separated list of DML operations when rules in this group should run. Valid values: Insert, Update, Delete, Undelete. Combined with Trigger Timing to determine exact trigger contexts (e.g., Before + Insert = BEFORE_INSERT).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter operations separated by semicolons: Insert;Update;Delete;Undelete. Note: Before + Undelete is ignored.
CustomField.label: Trigger Operations
